hero.eyebrow: Available on Web · iOS & Android coming soon
hero.headline: Imagine all your family's calendars, tasks, and lists — running on your voice.
hero.sub: Eazy.Family syncs every detail of your day-to-day into one elegant App — powered by one surprisingly smart button.

pain.headline: Your family group chat is not a plan.
pain.headlineSub: And synced calendars won't solve it.
pain.card1Quote: "You shouldn't need 20 minutes to plan your family's week."
pain.card1Problem: Your calendar. Their calendar. The school newsletter. The WhatsApp thread. Every week the same ritual — four sources to build a picture of your week, that still isn't clear.
pain.card1Solution: Shows every family member's schedule in one view, prepares you for each, and flags conflicts before they happen.
pain.card2Quote: "Every family has two task lists. The one everyone sees. And the one living in their head."
pain.card2Problem: You're thinking about the broken shelf. They're planning the trip. Nobody's mentioned the birthday present that needs ordering by Thursday.
pain.card2Solution: Eazy gives every task a place — shared or personal, assigned or open — so nothing gets missed.
pain.card3Quote: "The shopping list is in your head, on texts, and three different notes apps."
pain.card3Problem: You're at the store. They're standing in front of the fridge. You guessed on the olive oil and come home to see they already bought bananas!
pain.card3Solution: Eazy keeps one shared list, updated by voice, visible to everyone, smart enough to suggest what you're probably running out of.

orbe.headline: You're done navigating menus and screens!
orbe.headlineSub: It's one button from now on.
orbe.sub: Press the Orbe. Your whole family's day opens up — schedules, tasks, shopping. Add anything by voice. Let Eazy handle the rest.
orbe.calendarDesc: Every family member. Every platform. Always in sync.
orbe.tasksDesc: Shared, personal, assigned. Everything visible, nothing forgotten.
orbe.shoppingDesc: One list for everyone. Updated by voice. Organised by category, smarter every week.
orbe.ritualsDesc: Daily habits and family routines, tracked with a simple check-in.
orbe.quote: "The Orbe doesn't just organise your family. It thinks ahead."

intelligence.headline: Most apps wait for you to tell them what to do.
intelligence.sub: Behind every press of the Orbe, Eazy is quietly working — learning your family's patterns, solving problems before they happen, and thinking ahead so you don't have to.
intelligence.card1Problem: Child pickup at 3pm. Dentist at 3pm. Different calendars, nobody noticed.
intelligence.card1Solution: Eazy catches it before it's too late. Lets you know and saves your week.
intelligence.card2Problem: You're running low on olive oil.
intelligence.card2Solution: Eazy knows — because it's tracking how often you shop for your essentials. The suggestions are waiting before you open the app.
intelligence.card3Problem: That broken thing has been on the list for two weeks. The birthday present needs ordering by Thursday.
intelligence.card3Solution: Eazy notices what's been sitting too long — before it becomes an issue.
intelligence.card4Problem: The more your family uses Eazy, the smarter it gets. Shopping cycles, task habits, schedule rhythms…
intelligence.card4Solution: Eazy becomes your family's quiet personal assistant.
intelligence.closing: Finally, a family plan your family can actually depend on. And it's delivered to you every morning.

digest.headline: Before your day starts, Eazy already has.
digest.sub: One notification. No noise — just a clear picture of your family's day.
digest.card1Body: Every family member. Every commitment. Conflicts flagged, travel time accounted for, nothing missing.
digest.card2Body: The single most important task your family needs to handle today. Not a list. Just the one thing that matters most.
digest.card3Body: What's open, what's overdue, what's been sitting too long. Eazy notices and organises it.
digest.card4Body: Three items you're probably running low on. Based on your household patterns. Add them with one tap.
digest.card5Body: Your personal morning routine — 5 days straight! The family event is planned. Small things that deserve a moment.
digest.card6Body: The birthday is in 6 days. The car service you keep moving. What's worth preparing for before it sneaks up.
digest.blockquote: "The Morning Digest isn't about motivating. It organises. It remembers. It notices the things you might have missed when life moves fast."
digest.chiefOfStaff: That's a family chief of staff.

howItWorks.headline: It only takes a few minutes.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up, name your family, invite your partners and members. Everyone gets their own login. Apple or Android, everyone syncs instantly.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Google, Outlook, Apple — connect whatever each person uses. Eazy pulls every calendar into one shared family view. No switching. No double entry.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Add anything by voice or text — events, tasks, shopping items, journal. Eazy routes it to the right place. Your family sees it instantly.
howItWorks.platformSub: Available on Web · iOS & Android coming soon · English, German, French, Italian
howItWorks.downloadSub: Available on Web · iOS & Android coming soon · English, German, French, Italian

pricing.headline: One plan. Try it free for 14 days.
pricing.billingNote2: Cancel anytime. Card required, not charged for 14 days.
pricing.cardNote:
Billed annually at $44.99. Or $4.99 month-to-month.
Cancel anytime. Card not charged for 14 days.
features: Unlimited calendars across Google, Apple, and Outlook
Unlimited private and shared lists for Shopping and Tasks
Full voice AI — Orbe, your family's own assistant
Full intelligence layer — conflict detection, shopping frequency, task escalation
Rituals & Journal — your private space for reflection and pattern recognition
Morning Digest — daily agenda planning: in app & email
Settings — granular customization across privacy and features
One free month for every family you refer
pricing.feature2: Full intelligence layer — conflict detection, shopping frequency, task escalation
pricing.feature5: One free month for every family you refer
pricing.cancelNote: Cancel before day 14 and you won't be charged.

cta.headline: One button. Every calendar. Every list.

about.storyP1: Family life is full of moving parts — schedules that shift, shopping lists that multiply, and conversations split across too many channels.
about.storyQuote: "Time flies! The days might be long, but the years are short. We built Eazy.Family so you spend less time managing — and more time together."
about.storyP2: One private, calm space for all of it. No ads, no noise, no strangers. Just your family.
about.value1Desc: Every product decision starts with one question: does this make family life meaningfully better?
about.value2Desc: Your data is encrypted and never sold. Your family's information is yours alone. We will never run ads.
about.value3Desc: Real families shape every feature we build. Your feedback is appreciated and becomes our roadmap.
about.longP1: We started with a frustration most families know well: too many apps, too many channels, too much noise. The family group chat gets messy. Calendars don't sync. Someone misses the school pickup. The shopping list lives in three different places. Too much in our heads.
about.longP1Strong: too many apps, too many channels, too much noise.
about.longP1Rest: The family group chat gets buried. Calendars don't sync. Someone misses the school pickup. The shopping list lives in three different places.
about.longP2: We wanted one place — private, secure, genuinely simple — that brings it all together. And we wanted it to be smart enough to think ahead, so the people using it could think about something else for a change.
about.longP3Strong: Eazy.Family is built around one smart button: the Orbe.
about.longP3Rest: Everything your family needs, managed by your voice. There when you need it, with one tap, out of your way when you don't.
about.longP4: Eazy is shaped by the families who use it every day. If that sounds like something you'd want to be part of, join us — you'll help make it better for your family and many others.
about.ctaHeadline: One button. Every calendar. Every list.

waitlist.headline: The family group chat is not a plan. And
waitlist.sub: Eazy.Family is a voice-first family hub built around one button — the Orbe. Every calendar synced. Every task shared. Every list updated by voice. And every morning, a digest that thinks ahead so you don't have to.
waitlist.noSpam: No spam. One email when we launch.
waitlist.quote1: “Your Sunday evening planning ritual ends here.”
waitlist.quote3: “One shared shopping list. Updated by voice. Smarter every week.”
waitlist.successSub: We'll send one email the moment Eazy launches on iOS and Android. No noise before that.
waitlist.referralPrompt: Know another family who'd love this?
waitlist.referralPrompt2: Share your link and get a free month when they subscribe.
